food.title: Food Order
food.successMsg: We will prepare and deliver your order.

minibar.title: Minibar Refill
minibar.description: We will deliver drinks and snacks shortly.

transfer.title: Transfer
transfer.chatHint: Can't find your destination? Write us in chat.
transfer.priceHint: Up to 35 km — 500 RUB, 35–50 km — 700 RUB, over 50 km — 1000 RUB
transfer.successMsg: Driver will arrive at the specified time.

cleaning.title: Cleaning
cleaning.description: Choose a convenient time — we will clean the cottage.
cleaning.readyHint: Please be ready to vacate the cottage during cleaning.
cleaning.successMsg: Cleaning will be done at the specified time.

towels.title: Towel Replacement
towels.description: We will bring fresh towels shortly.
towels.success: Request accepted! Towels will be delivered.

gates.title: Open Gates
gates.description: Send a request to the administrator to open the gates.
gates.success: Request sent! Please wait for confirmation.

chat.empty: Start a conversation with the administrator

info.title: Eco Glamp "Forest Haven"
info.aboutText: Welcome to our glamping! Enjoy nature without sacrificing comfort. Our team is always ready to help you. Please note that food orders must be placed at least 1 hour in advance.
info.servicesText: We offer: menu dining, transfer services, cottage cleaning, minibar refills, and fresh towels on request.

validation.selectDish: Please select at least one item
validation.minAdvanceTime: Food orders must be placed at least 1 hour in advance
